description_long: This is a tall, freestanding shelving unit with four evenly spaced rectangular shelves and a prominent display sign at the top. The structure is constructed from dark-colored metal, giving it a sturdy and industrial appearance. The base is a flat, square platform that provides stability, and the vertical supports extend upward to hold both the shelves and the sign. The sign features a graphic with bottles and the text 'XPS', suggesting it is designed for product display or retail use. The open design allows for easy access to items placed on the shelves from the front and sides. The overall look is sleek and functional, suitable for urban retail or promotional environments.
description: A tall, dark metal shelving unit with four shelves and a large branded display sign at the top, designed for product display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all four shelves and the large branded sign at the top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the shelves and the thin profile of the sign.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the sign and the open structure of the shelves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the shelf depth and vertical supports.
